title: NLP-029-how-to-automatically-summarize-long-documents原理与应用
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-029 How to automatically summarize long documents?

 29. How to automatically summarize long documents?
答案要点:
方法:
1. Extractive (抽取式):
   - TextRank, LSA
   - BERT-based (BERTSUM)
   - 选择关键句子
2. Abstractive (生成式):
   - BART, T5, PEGASUS
   - 生成新句子
3. 评估: ROUGE-1/2/L

质量评分: 93/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

---
